# Psalms 109

## Verses (31)

| # | Basic English Bible | Compare |
|---|---|---|
| [1](BBE.md#v1) | God of my praise, let my prayer be answered; | [WEB](WEB.md#v1) · [KJV](KJV.md#v1) · [ASV](ASV.md#v1) |
| [2](BBE.md#v2) | For the mouth of the sinner is open against me in deceit: his tongue has said false things against me. | [WEB](WEB.md#v2) · [KJV](KJV.md#v2) · [ASV](ASV.md#v2) |
| [3](BBE.md#v3) | Words of hate are round about me; they have made war against me without cause. | [WEB](WEB.md#v3) · [KJV](KJV.md#v3) · [ASV](ASV.md#v3) |
| [4](BBE.md#v4) | For my love they give me back hate; but I have given myself to prayer. | [WEB](WEB.md#v4) · [KJV](KJV.md#v4) · [ASV](ASV.md#v4) |
| [5](BBE.md#v5) | They have put on me evil for good; hate in exchange for my love. | [WEB](WEB.md#v5) · [KJV](KJV.md#v5) · [ASV](ASV.md#v5) |
| [6](BBE.md#v6) | Put an evil man over him; and let one be placed at his right hand to say evil of him. | [WEB](WEB.md#v6) · [KJV](KJV.md#v6) · [ASV](ASV.md#v6) |
| [7](BBE.md#v7) | When he is judged, let the decision go against him; and may his prayer become sin. | [WEB](WEB.md#v7) · [KJV](KJV.md#v7) · [ASV](ASV.md#v7) |
| [8](BBE.md#v8) | Let his life be short; let another take his position of authority. | [WEB](WEB.md#v8) · [KJV](KJV.md#v8) · [ASV](ASV.md#v8) |
| [9](BBE.md#v9) | Let his children have no father, and his wife be made a widow. | [WEB](WEB.md#v9) · [KJV](KJV.md#v9) · [ASV](ASV.md#v9) |
| [10](BBE.md#v10) | Let his children be wanderers, looking to others for their food; let them be sent away from the company of their friends. | [WEB](WEB.md#v10) · [KJV](KJV.md#v10) · [ASV](ASV.md#v10) |
| [11](BBE.md#v11) | Let his creditor take all his goods; and let others have the profit of his work. | [WEB](WEB.md#v11) · [KJV](KJV.md#v11) · [ASV](ASV.md#v11) |
| [12](BBE.md#v12) | Let no man have pity on him, or give help to his children when he is dead. | [WEB](WEB.md#v12) · [KJV](KJV.md#v12) · [ASV](ASV.md#v12) |
| [13](BBE.md#v13) | Let his seed be cut off; in the coming generation let their name go out of memory. | [WEB](WEB.md#v13) · [KJV](KJV.md#v13) · [ASV](ASV.md#v13) |
| [14](BBE.md#v14) | Let the Lord keep in mind the wrongdoing of his fathers; and may the sin of his mother have no forgiveness. | [WEB](WEB.md#v14) · [KJV](KJV.md#v14) · [ASV](ASV.md#v14) |
| [15](BBE.md#v15) | Let them be ever before the eyes of the Lord, so that the memory of them may be cut off from the earth. | [WEB](WEB.md#v15) · [KJV](KJV.md#v15) · [ASV](ASV.md#v15) |
| [16](BBE.md#v16) | Because he had no mercy, but was cruel to the low and the poor, designing the death of the broken-hearted. | [WEB](WEB.md#v16) · [KJV](KJV.md#v16) · [ASV](ASV.md#v16) |
| [17](BBE.md#v17) | As he took pleasure in cursing, so let it come on him; and as he had no delight in blessing, let it be far from him. | [WEB](WEB.md#v17) · [KJV](KJV.md#v17) · [ASV](ASV.md#v17) |
| [18](BBE.md#v18) | He put on cursing like a robe, and it has come into his body like water, and into his bones like oil. | [WEB](WEB.md#v18) · [KJV](KJV.md#v18) · [ASV](ASV.md#v18) |
| [19](BBE.md#v19) | Let it be to him as a robe which he puts on, let it be like a band which is round him at all times. | [WEB](WEB.md#v19) · [KJV](KJV.md#v19) · [ASV](ASV.md#v19) |
| [20](BBE.md#v20) | Let this be the reward given to my haters from the Lord, and to those who say evil of my soul. | [WEB](WEB.md#v20) · [KJV](KJV.md#v20) · [ASV](ASV.md#v20) |
| [21](BBE.md#v21) | But, O Lord God, give me your help, because of your name; take me out of danger, because your mercy is good. | [WEB](WEB.md#v21) · [KJV](KJV.md#v21) · [ASV](ASV.md#v21) |
| [22](BBE.md#v22) | For I am poor and in need, and my heart is wounded in me. | [WEB](WEB.md#v22) · [KJV](KJV.md#v22) · [ASV](ASV.md#v22) |
| [23](BBE.md#v23) | I am gone like the shade when it is stretched out: I am forced out of my place like a locust. | [WEB](WEB.md#v23) · [KJV](KJV.md#v23) · [ASV](ASV.md#v23) |
| [24](BBE.md#v24) | My knees are feeble for need of food; there is no fat on my bones. | [WEB](WEB.md#v24) · [KJV](KJV.md#v24) · [ASV](ASV.md#v24) |
| [25](BBE.md#v25) | As for me, they make sport of me; shaking their heads when they see me. | [WEB](WEB.md#v25) · [KJV](KJV.md#v25) · [ASV](ASV.md#v25) |
| [26](BBE.md#v26) | Give me help, O Lord my God; in your mercy be my saviour; | [WEB](WEB.md#v26) · [KJV](KJV.md#v26) · [ASV](ASV.md#v26) |
| [27](BBE.md#v27) | So that they may see that it is the work of your hand; that you, Lord, have done it. | [WEB](WEB.md#v27) · [KJV](KJV.md#v27) · [ASV](ASV.md#v27) |
| [28](BBE.md#v28) | They may give curses but you give blessing; when they come up against me, put them to shame; but let your servant be glad. | [WEB](WEB.md#v28) · [KJV](KJV.md#v28) · [ASV](ASV.md#v28) |
| [29](BBE.md#v29) | Let my haters be clothed with shame, covering themselves with shame as with a robe. | [WEB](WEB.md#v29) · [KJV](KJV.md#v29) · [ASV](ASV.md#v29) |
| [30](BBE.md#v30) | I will give the Lord great praise with my mouth; yes, I will give praise to him among all the people. | [WEB](WEB.md#v30) · [KJV](KJV.md#v30) · [ASV](ASV.md#v30) |
| [31](BBE.md#v31) | For he is ever at the right hand of the poor, to take him out of the hands of those who go after his soul. | [WEB](WEB.md#v31) · [KJV](KJV.md#v31) · [ASV](ASV.md#v31) |
